title: FORTE - Libre Office - Slip
description: php word to replace values and docx-merge to  merge two or more DOCX
config:
RUN apt update
RUN mkdir -p /usr/share/man/man1
RUN apt install -y libreoffice
RUN composer require phpoffice/phpword:1.1.0
RUN composer require krustnic/docx-merge
RUN apt install -y libzip-dev
RUN pecl install zip
RUN echo "extension=zip.so" >> /usr/local/etc/php/php.ini
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y curl jq && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
RUN rm -f /FORTE_PHP_Library.php
RUN curl -X "GET" \
  "https://forteunderwriters.dev.cloud.processmaker.net/api/1.0/scripts/770?v4" \
  -H "accept: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiI2IiwianRpIjoiZDAzMTM0ZjY3OGI3NGUwYzAxMjIxZTcyYWFlNTVkZjY2YWRjNGUwMTlmYmY4NmUzMjg5Yzg5ZmUwNTY2OTRhZDRjNjlhOTRlZDZmZjQ3MTYiLCJpYXQiOjE3NTc2MjQ2MDMuODA4MzUyLCJuYmYiOjE3NTc2MjQ2MDMuODA4MzU1LCJleHAiOjE3ODkxNjA2MDMuODAzNDU5LCJzdWIiOiIyIiwic2NvcGVzIjpbXX0.k_XOEmD3adb1ZKID7qJWFeO75Qc9GCijAIa7LjjAmrRkzjtNld6YtV6j9OM4-uflRIp5fpZ7n7gDivJtuf9Wd6oYOde97Qq9S2wGaqZlgGOSvUBe8RtrIJMKu0ZryI6v9hvTt0XgppptfINIsEEtEA6WxI7B7VHtoh-i-zfRxYHCKRf6NO0Uv2SaEJ5TdoUjRKAogf3RAyQW81mdXPYUrod-fuPWyqrOxZ9jQ0dAjsERFnV-RX1SZfmOjKI3EWtLQCDjaN4D5tXR_9M7nM2-_PkUPPEuohY4Hfg6tM3Ws7Ql8baRqr5maCrT-yyupcf4GH4w231VhYHNiwodbdn6qsc3rIu_vBt8oyBvINx50QoaKoCVhq0FAyscXSGz3X0zAE6T9gh7BXmYmto_ucrDekdqVOsDyxb2skKArKWoBMCK4Bnm5T27z8C9-IYJT_fL40xOw_jbTwvFnXim30C2zl3DdabDyFg6o8Uxu08k3UNsYwg1sfhE-MPK3_n4fIU_DilMYo9guSFaz8x1N6RJ7iw-3RIQHjUxfFM2_zUTG533c8YK-qk7sG5imoQtSLgSR9cEJjomtn5SnzGmHsH0ZBmjb-uPhbHUkfecKuKpWQVpz6uQcJ8RnLVe_sNhIhrf6GzEHvZ_p8CqmcerCw22D6AFBdGyW2fATBCazNdLF54" | \
